name: Smart Game Format FF[4] specification
license: Specification reference; no text copied into cards
why: Primary SGF format reference used to validate setup properties, tree structure, and game-record parsing boundaries.

name: Sgfmill FF[4] property list
license: Documentation reference; no text copied into cards
why: Concise property table for AB/AW/AE/B/W and related FF[4] fields; used as a cross-check for GoMentor parser coverage.

name: Sensei's Library Go Terms index
why: Broad terminology index used only for coverage planning. GoMentor cards use original teaching wording and do not copy definitions.

name: Josekipedia professional game collection
license: Creative Commons license stated by Josekipedia for game database; exact terms require release review
why: The page says comments and variations are discarded and game records are distributed under a Creative Commons License. GoMentor currently treats it only as a future frequency-mining candidate.

name: Josekipedia contributing and copyright policy
why: Used to remind maintainers not to copy user-entered text or professional commentary into GoMentor without a rights review.
